questions.enonce: Who is the most famous anonymous street artist in the world ?
Street art is always considered legal by city authorities.
A wall covered in drawings or writing in a public place is called {{1}}.

pairs.right: A sheet of card or plastic with a design cut out of it
A large painting applied directly to a wall
A stylized signature of a graffiti artist

questions.enonce: What is the main goal of 'protest art' ?
options: To raise awareness about social or political issues
